title: check_extension_use: param should be &[Form] not &Stmt
description: check_extension_use takes &form::Stmt (&Vec<Form>) but only calls .as_slice() internally. The not-recursion on line 252 must do stmt[1..].to_vec() — cloning each Form (heap String) — purely to satisfy the &Vec<Form> parameter. Changing the signature to &[Form] and passing stmt.as_slice() at all call sites eliminates that allocation entirely.
